title: Tragacantha paralurges
taxonomy: Tragacantha paralurges belongs to the Fabaceae family and is a species of plant. The genus Tragacantha is sometimes considered a synonym of Astragalus, a large and diverse genus of legumes. However, some sources still recognize Tragacantha as a valid genus. The classification of Tragacantha paralurges may vary depending on the specific taxonomic treatment used. Further research is needed to determine its classification with certainty.
